title: Dungeon/Mine Template System Visual Test
sourceOrigin: original prototype generated from scratch using vanilla mine.png tile language.
sourceReason: Tests a believable custom mine floor with a main chamber, side pockets, reachable exit, treasure, and ore interest points.
